description: AI Workspace — hooks catch the late-surfacing bugs that kept appearing in marathon sessions

PostToolUse.description: Validate docker-compose.yml after any edit to it

hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *"docker-compose.yml" || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *"compose.yml" ]]; then docker compose config --quiet 2>&1 | head -40; fi

PostToolUse.description: Sanity-check SQL files for balanced parens and trailing semicolon

hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.sql ]]; then awk 'BEGIN{p=0} {for(i=1;i<=length($0);i++){c=substr($0,i,1); if(c=="(")p++; if(c==")")p--}} END{if(p!=0) print "WARN: unbalanced parens: " p; else print "paren balance OK"}' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; fi

PostToolUse.description: Flag .env writes — Claude should be editing .env.example, not .env

hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *"/.env" && "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" != *".env.example" ]]; then echo 'WARN: wrote to .env directly. Edit .env.example instead and let the user fill in real values.'; fi

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_BASH_COMMAND" in *"docker system prune -a"*|*"docker volume rm"*|*"docker compose down -v"*|*"rm -rf /data"*|*"rm -rf /home"*) echo 'BLOCKED: destructive command requires explicit user confirmation. Ask first.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
